신명기 32:1.content: Give ear, you heavens, and I will speak. Let the earth hear the words of my mouth.

신명기 32:2.content: My doctrine will drop as the rain. My speech will condense as the dew, as the misty rain on the tender grass, as the showers on the herb.

신명기 32:3.content: For I will proclaim Yahweh’s name. Ascribe greatness to our God!

신명기 32:4.content: The Rock: his work is perfect, for all his ways are just. A God of faithfulness who does no wrong, just and right is he.

신명기 32:5.content: They have dealt corruptly with him. They are not his children, because of their defect. They are a perverse and crooked generation.

신명기 32:6.content: Is this the way you repay Yahweh, foolish and unwise people? Isn’t he your father who has bought you? He has made you and established you.

신명기 32:7.content: Remember the days of old. Consider the years of many generations. Ask your father, and he will show you; your elders, and they will tell you.

신명기 32:8.content: When the Most High gave to the nations their inheritance, when he separated the children of men, he set the bounds of the peoples according to the number of the children of Israel.

신명기 32:9.content: For Yahweh’s portion is his people. Jacob is the lot of his inheritance.

신명기 32:10.content: He found him in a desert land, in the waste howling wilderness. He surrounded him. He cared for him. He kept him as the apple of his eye.

신명기 32:11.content: As an eagle that stirs up her nest, that flutters over her young, he spread abroad his wings, he took them, he bore them on his feathers.

신명기 32:12.content: Yahweh alone led him. There was no foreign god with him.

신명기 32:13.content: He made him ride on the high places of the earth. He ate the increase of the field. He caused him to suck honey out of the rock, oil out of the flinty rock;

신명기 32:14.content: butter from the herd, and milk from the flock, with fat of lambs, rams of the breed of Bashan, and goats, with the finest of the wheat. From the blood of the grape, you drank wine.

신명기 32:15.content: But Jeshurun grew fat, and kicked. You have grown fat. You have grown thick. You have become sleek. Then he abandoned God who made him, and rejected the Rock of his salvation.

신명기 32:16.content: They moved him to jealousy with strange gods. They provoked him to anger with abominations.

신명기 32:17.content: They sacrificed to demons, not God, to gods that they didn’t know, to new gods that came up recently, which your fathers didn’t dread.

신명기 32:18.content: Of the Rock who became your father, you are unmindful, and have forgotten God who gave you birth.

신명기 32:19.content: Yahweh saw and abhorred, because of the provocation of his sons and his daughters.

신명기 32:20.content: He said, “I will hide my face from them. I will see what their end will be; for they are a very perverse generation, children in whom is no faithfulness.

신명기 32:21.content: They have moved me to jealousy with that which is not God. They have provoked me to anger with their vanities. I will move them to jealousy with those who are not a people. I will provoke them to anger with a foolish nation.

신명기 32:22.content: For a fire is kindled in my anger, that burns to the lowest Sheol, devours the earth with its increase, and sets the foundations of the mountains on fire.

신명기 32:23.content: “I will heap evils on them. I will spend my arrows on them.

신명기 32:24.content: They shall be wasted with hunger, and devoured with burning heat and bitter destruction. I will send the teeth of animals on them, with the venom of vipers that glide in the dust.

신명기 32:25.content: Outside the sword will bereave, and in the rooms, terror on both young man and virgin, the nursing infant with the gray-haired man.

신명기 32:26.content: I said that I would scatter them afar. I would make their memory to cease from among men;

신명기 32:27.content: were it not that I feared the provocation of the enemy, lest their adversaries should judge wrongly, lest they should say, ‘Our hand is exalted, Yahweh has not done all this.’ ”

신명기 32:28.content: For they are a nation void of counsel. There is no understanding in them.

신명기 32:29.content: Oh that they were wise, that they understood this, that they would consider their latter end!

신명기 32:30.content: How could one chase a thousand, and two put ten thousand to flight, unless their Rock had sold them, and Yahweh had delivered them up?

신명기 32:31.content: For their rock is not as our Rock, even our enemies themselves concede.

신명기 32:32.content: For their vine is of the vine of Sodom, of the fields of Gomorrah. Their grapes are poison grapes. Their clusters are bitter.

신명기 32:33.content: Their wine is the poison of serpents, the cruel venom of asps.

신명기 32:34.content: “Isn’t this laid up in store with me, sealed up among my treasures?

신명기 32:35.content: Vengeance is mine, and recompense, at the time when their foot slides; for the day of their calamity is at hand. Their doom rushes at them.”

신명기 32:36.content: For Yahweh will judge his people, and have compassion on his servants, when he sees that their power is gone; that there is no one remaining, shut up or left at large.

신명기 32:37.content: He will say, “Where are their gods, the rock in which they took refuge;

신명기 32:38.content: which ate the fat of their sacrifices, and drank the wine of their drink offering? Let them rise up and help you! Let them be your protection.

신명기 32:39.content: “See now that I myself am he. There is no god with me. I kill and I make alive. I wound and I heal. There is no one who can deliver out of my hand.

신명기 32:40.content: For I lift up my hand to heaven and declare, as I live forever,

신명기 32:41.content: if I sharpen my glittering sword, my hand grasps it in judgment; I will take vengeance on my adversaries, and will repay those who hate me.

신명기 32:42.content: I will make my arrows drunk with blood. My sword shall devour flesh with the blood of the slain and the captives, from the head of the leaders of the enemy.”

신명기 32:43.content: Rejoice, you nations, with his people, for he will avenge the blood of his servants. He will take vengeance on his adversaries, and will make atonement for his land and for his people.

신명기 32:44.content: Moses came and spoke all the words of this song in the ears of the people, he and Joshua the son of Nun.

신명기 32:45.content: Moses finished reciting all these words to all Israel.

신명기 32:46.content: He said to them, “Set your heart to all the words which I testify to you today, which you shall command your children to observe to do, all the words of this law.

신명기 32:47.content: For it is no vain thing for you, because it is your life, and through this thing you shall prolong your days in the land, where you go over the Jordan to possess it.”

신명기 32:48.content: Yahweh spoke to Moses that same day, saying,

신명기 32:49.content: “Go up into this mountain of Abarim, to Mount Nebo, which is in the land of Moab, that is across from Jericho; and see the land of Canaan, which I give to the children of Israel for a possession.

신명기 32:50.content: Die on the mountain where you go up, and be gathered to your people, as Aaron your brother died on Mount Hor, and was gathered to his people;

신명기 32:51.content: because you trespassed against me among the children of Israel at the waters of Meribah of Kadesh, in the wilderness of Zin; because you didn’t uphold my holiness among the children of Israel.

신명기 32:52.content: For you shall see the land from a distance; but you shall not go there into the land which I give the children of Israel.”
